assessor_raw: Retail escalation prediction: methodologically sound. Temporal split with issue category and channel stratification. PR-AUC is well-justified for imbalanced prediction. Both models receive same text input (raw thread + metadata). Equal tuning effort with same metric (PR-AUC). Agent behavior confound controls (tenure band, agent ID ablation, per-agent analysis). Queue policy monitoring. Bootstrap CIs. Test set policy rigorous. Scope bounded to same helpdesk. Verdict: defense_wins.
